description: CompositionBlue and white striped formal shirt made of 100% cotton, has a slim spread collar, a full buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttonable cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Impeccable cuts and a luxury construction is a winning sartorial combination - and this shirt from black coffee has both. Lead yourself to a new generation of style and sophistication with this cotton shirt. Pair it with straight fit formal trousers, classy accessories and shiny oxfords. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
